requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — EGAT Energy Label No.5 + DEDE MEPS for LED Lighting
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——EGAT 5 号能效标签 + DEDE 最低能效标准（MEPS）（LED 照明）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——EGAT 5 號能效標籤 + DEDE 最低能效標準（MEPS）（LED 照明）

summary.en: Thailand promotes LED lighting efficiency through the EGAT (Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand) Energy Label No.5 scheme and the DEDE (Department of Alternative Energy Development and Efficiency, Ministry of Energy) Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS). The Energy Label No.5 (and the No.5 three-star / five-star ranking tiers introduced to differentiate the most efficient products) signals high luminous efficacy (lm/W), and is widely expected by Thai retailers, government green-procurement, and consumers. Products are tested by EGAT-recognised laboratories against efficacy and performance criteria before the No.5 label may be displayed. DEDE MEPS set the floor efficiency below which covered lamp types should not be marketed. Where a specific LED lamp type is brought under a mandatory TIS energy standard, the efficiency requirement also becomes a TISI licensing condition — verify the current scope for the exact product type.
summary.zh: 泰国通过 EGAT（泰国电力局）5 号能效标签方案及 DEDE（替代能源开发与能效部，能源部下属）最低能效标准（MEPS）推动 LED 照明能效。5 号能效标签（以及为区分最高效产品而引入的 5 号三星/五星分级）代表高光效（lm/W），广泛被泰国零售商、政府绿色采购及消费者所期待。产品须经 EGAT 认可实验室按能效及性能标准检测，方可显示 5 号标签。DEDE MEPS 设定了纳管灯型不得低于的能效下限。若特定 LED 灯型被纳入强制性 TIS 能效标准，则该能效要求亦成为 TISI 许可条件——请核查具体产品类型的现行适用范围。
summary.zht: 泰國通過 EGAT（泰國電力局）5 號能效標籤方案及 DEDE（替代能源開發與能效部，能源部下屬）最低能效標準（MEPS）推動 LED 照明能效。5 號能效標籤（以及為區分最高效產品而引入的 5 號三星/五星分級）代表高光效（lm/W），廣泛被泰國零售商、政府綠色採購及消費者所期待。產品須經 EGAT 認可實驗室按能效及性能標準檢測，方可顯示 5 號標籤。DEDE MEPS 設定了納管燈型不得低於的能效下限。若特定 LED 燈型被納入強制性 TIS 能效標準，則該能效要求亦成為 TISI 許可條件——請核查具體產品類型的現行適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: EGAT Energy Label No.5 — voluntary high-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting (Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand)
DEDE Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Department of Alternative Energy Development and Efficiency, Ministry of Energy (Energy Conservation Promotion Act B.E. 2535)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum for China market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. The CEL grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds and has no mutual recognition with Thailand's EGAT Energy Label No.5 or DEDE MEPS.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）须向 CQC/CECP 注册，对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。CEL 等级基于绝对 lm/W 阈值，与泰国 EGAT 5 号能效标签或 DEDE MEPS 无互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）須向 CQC/CECP 注冊，對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。CEL 等級基於絕對 lm/W 閾值，與泰國 EGAT 5 號能效標籤或 DEDE MEPS 無互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: China's CEL grade does not transfer to Thailand's EGAT Energy Label No.5 or DEDE MEPS — they are separate schemes with no mutual recognition, different test laboratories, and different criteria. A product carrying a CN Grade 1/2 CEL must still be tested by an EGAT-recognised laboratory against the No.5 criteria before displaying the No.5 label, and must meet DEDE MEPS where the lamp type is covered. While the EGAT No.5 label itself is a voluntary marketing/green-procurement signal rather than a hard market-access barrier, in practice Thai distributors and government tenders often require it, so the commercial gap is real. Exporters should confirm whether the specific lamp type is also caught by a mandatory TIS energy or efficiency standard, in which case efficiency becomes a TISI licensing condition, not merely a label.
gap.zh: 中国 CEL 等级不可转移至泰国 EGAT 5 号能效标签或 DEDE MEPS——两者为独立方案，无互认、检测实验室不同、标准不同。持有中国 1/2 级 CEL 的产品仍须经 EGAT 认可实验室按 5 号标准检测，方可显示 5 号标签，并须在灯型纳管时满足 DEDE MEPS。虽然 EGAT 5 号标签本身是自愿性营销/绿色采购信号而非硬性市场准入壁垒，但实务中泰国经销商及政府招标常要求该标签，因此商业差距真实存在。出口商应确认具体灯型是否同时被强制性 TIS 能效或效率标准纳管，若是，则能效成为 TISI 许可条件，而不仅是标签。
gap.zht: 中國 CEL 等級不可轉移至泰國 EGAT 5 號能效標籤或 DEDE MEPS——兩者為獨立方案，無互認、檢測實驗室不同、標準不同。持有中國 1/2 級 CEL 的產品仍須經 EGAT 認可實驗室按 5 號標準檢測，方可顯示 5 號標籤，並須在燈型納管時滿足 DEDE MEPS。雖然 EGAT 5 號標籤本身是自願性營銷/綠色採購信號而非硬性市場准入壁壘，但實務中泰國經銷商及政府招標常要求該標籤，因此商業差距真實存在。出口商應確認具體燈型是否同時被強制性 TIS 能效或效率標準納管，若是，則能效成為 TISI 許可條件，而不僅是標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mostly voluntary/commercial — EGAT Energy Label No.5 is a voluntary efficiency label widely required by Thai retailers and government green procurement; DEDE MEPS set a floor for covered lamp types; efficiency becomes mandatory where the lamp type is brought under a mandatory TIS energy standard (verify current scope)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label (CEL) registration required

source.publisher: EGAT (Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand) — Energy Label No.5 programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand drives LED lighting efficiency through the EGAT Energy Label No.5 scheme and DEDE MEPS rather than an EU-style mandatory Ecodesign efficacy floor. A Chinese product's CEL grade does not carry over — it must be re-tested by an EGAT-recognised laboratory before the No.5 label may be shown, and must meet DEDE MEPS where covered. The No.5 label is largely a voluntary commercial/green-procurement requirement, but is often demanded by Thai distributors and tenders. Confirm whether the specific lamp type is also under a mandatory TIS energy standard, which would make efficiency a TISI licensing condition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国通过 EGAT 5 号能效标签方案及 DEDE MEPS 推动 LED 照明能效，而非欧盟式强制性生态设计能效下限。中国产品的 CEL 等级不可沿用——须经 EGAT 认可实验室重新检测，方可显示 5 号标签，并须在纳管时满足 DEDE MEPS。5 号标签大体上是自愿性商业/绿色采购要求，但常被泰国经销商及招标所要求。请确认具体灯型是否同时纳入强制性 TIS 能效标准，若是则能效成为 TISI 许可条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國通過 EGAT 5 號能效標籤方案及 DEDE MEPS 推動 LED 照明能效，而非歐盟式強制性生態設計能效下限。中國產品的 CEL 等級不可沿用——須經 EGAT 認可實驗室重新檢測，方可顯示 5 號標籤，並須在納管時滿足 DEDE MEPS。5 號標籤大體上是自願性商業/綠色採購要求，但常被泰國經銷商及招標所要求。請確認具體燈型是否同時納入強制性 TIS 能效標準，若是則能效成為 TISI 許可條件。

requirement_topic.en: Performance and Labelling Disclosure — Thai Market Listing vs CN Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 性能与标签披露——泰国市场标示 vs 中国能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: 性能與標籤披露——泰國市場標示 vs 中國能效標識

summary.en: For LED lamps and luminaires marketed in Thailand, the key performance and labelling disclosures are: the EGAT Energy Label No.5 (showing efficacy and energy use, where the product qualifies and is enrolled), Thai-language product marking and rated data (input voltage 220-240 V / 230 V nominal, 50 Hz, power, luminous flux, colour temperature, rated life) per the applicable TIS standard, and the TIS mark itself for controlled products. Thai labelling and the importer/licence-holder identification must appear on packaging in the Thai language to satisfy Consumer Protection Board (OCPB) and TISI requirements. Performance claims (lumen output, lifetime, CRI) should be substantiated by test reports from a TISI-recognised laboratory; there is no single EU-style EEI A-G energy class — the No.5 label and star tiers are the principal consumer-facing efficiency signal.
summary.zh: 在泰国销售的 LED 灯及灯具，核心性能与标签披露包括：EGAT 5 号能效标签（在产品合格并登记时显示能效及能耗）、按适用 TIS 标准的泰文产品标示及额定数据（输入电压 220-240 V / 230 V 标称、50 Hz、功率、光通量、色温、额定寿命），以及受控产品的 TIS 标志本身。泰文标签及进口商/许可证持有人标识须以泰文出现在包装上，以满足消费者保护委员会（OCPB）及 TISI 要求。性能声明（流明输出、寿命、显色指数）应由 TISI 认可实验室的检测报告佐证；不存在欧盟式单一 EEI A-G 能效等级——5 号标签及星级是主要的面向消费者的能效信号。
summary.zht: 在泰國銷售的 LED 燈及燈具，核心性能與標籤披露包括：EGAT 5 號能效標籤（在產品合格並登記時顯示能效及能耗）、按適用 TIS 標準的泰文產品標示及額定數據（輸入電壓 220-240 V / 230 V 標稱、50 Hz、功率、光通量、色溫、額定壽命），以及受控產品的 TIS 標誌本身。泰文標籤及進口商/許可證持有人標識須以泰文出現在包裝上，以滿足消費者保護委員會（OCPB）及 TISI 要求。性能聲明（流明輸出、壽命、顯色指數）應由 TISI 認可實驗室的檢測報告佐證；不存在歐盟式單一 EEI A-G 能效等級——5 號標籤及星級是主要的面向消費者的能效信號。

standards_or_laws: EGAT Energy Label No.5 — efficiency labelling and product enrolment (Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand)
TISI product marking requirements under the applicable mandatory TIS standard (Thai-language label, rated data, TIS mark)
Office of the Consumer Protection Board (OCPB) Thai-language labelling requirements

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires and is registered with CQC/CECP before being affixed; it shows Grade 1-3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds in Chinese. CN product marking follows GB 7000/GB 30255 with Chinese-language rated data (220 V, 50 Hz). There is no mutual recognition between the CN CEL and the Thai EGAT No.5 label, and CN Chinese-language packaging does not satisfy Thai-language labelling or importer-identification requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL），须在贴附前向 CQC/CECP 注册；依据绝对 lm/W 阈值以中文显示 1-3 级。中国产品标示遵循 GB 7000/GB 30255，以中文标注额定数据（220 V，50 Hz）。中国 CEL 与泰国 EGAT 5 号标签无互认，中文包装亦不满足泰文标签或进口商标识要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL），須在貼附前向 CQC/CECP 注冊；依據絕對 lm/W 閾值以中文顯示 1-3 級。中國產品標示遵循 GB 7000/GB 30255，以中文標註額定數據（220 V，50 Hz）。中國 CEL 與泰國 EGAT 5 號標籤無互認，中文包裝亦不滿足泰文標籤或進口商標識要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Thai-market packaging and labelling differ materially from CN packaging: (1) packaging must carry Thai-language product information, rated data, and the in-country importer/licence-holder identity (a TISI and OCPB requirement) — Chinese-only labels are non-compliant; (2) the EGAT Energy Label No.5 is a separate enrolment from the CN CEL and is not granted on the basis of a CN CEL grade; (3) rated voltage must reflect Thailand's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (China uses 220 V), so the marked rating and design verification should cover the 220-240 V range; (4) performance claims must be backed by TISI-recognised laboratory reports rather than CN CNAS reports. The exporter must produce a Thailand-specific label artwork and substantiation package distinct from the CN CEL artwork.
gap.zh: 泰国市场包装与标签与中国包装存在实质差异：（1）包装须载有泰文产品信息、额定数据及在地进口商/许可证持有人身份（TISI 及 OCPB 要求）——仅中文标签不合规；（2）EGAT 5 号能效标签为独立于中国 CEL 的登记，不基于中国 CEL 等级授予；（3）额定电压须反映泰国 230 V / 50 Hz 电网（中国为 220 V），故标注额定值及设计验证应覆盖 220-240 V 范围；（4）性能声明须以 TISI 认可实验室报告佐证，而非中国 CNAS 报告。出口商须制作区别于中国 CEL 设计的泰国专属标签设计及佐证资料包。
gap.zht: 泰國市場包裝與標籤與中國包裝存在實質差異：（1）包裝須載有泰文產品信息、額定數據及在地進口商/許可證持有人身份（TISI 及 OCPB 要求）——僅中文標籤不合規；（2）EGAT 5 號能效標籤為獨立於中國 CEL 的登記，不基於中國 CEL 等級授予；（3）額定電壓須反映泰國 230 V / 50 Hz 電網（中國為 220 V），故標註額定值及設計驗證應覆蓋 220-240 V 範圍；（4）性能聲明須以 TISI 認可實驗室報告佐證，而非中國 CNAS 報告。出口商須製作區別於中國 CEL 設計的泰國專屬標籤設計及佐證資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — Thai-language product marking, rated data, and importer/licence-holder identification are mandatory under TISI/OCPB rules; the EGAT Energy Label No.5 enrolment is voluntary but commercially expected
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019; Chinese-language marking under GB 7000/GB 30255

source.publisher: TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute), Ministry of Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thai-market LED labelling requires Thai-language product information, rated data for the 230 V / 50 Hz grid, importer/licence-holder identification, and the TIS mark for controlled products, plus an optional but commercially-expected EGAT Energy Label No.5 enrolment. The Chinese CEL grade and Chinese-language packaging do not satisfy Thai requirements and there is no mutual recognition. Exporters must prepare a distinct Thailand label artwork and substantiate performance claims with TISI-recognised laboratory reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国市场 LED 标签要求泰文产品信息、面向 230 V / 50 Hz 电网的额定数据、进口商/许可证持有人标识，以及受控产品的 TIS 标志，另加可选但商业上被期待的 EGAT 5 号能效标签登记。中国 CEL 等级及中文包装不满足泰国要求，且无互认。出口商须准备区别于中国的泰国标签设计，并以 TISI 认可实验室报告佐证性能声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國市場 LED 標籤要求泰文產品信息、面向 230 V / 50 Hz 電網的額定數據、進口商/許可證持有人標識，以及受控產品的 TIS 標誌，另加可選但商業上被期待的 EGAT 5 號能效標籤登記。中國 CEL 等級及中文包裝不滿足泰國要求，且無互認。出口商須準備區別於中國的泰國標籤設計，並以 TISI 認可實驗室報告佐證性能聲明。
